v3_insert_math_mode_fix.issue: Line 19 contains 'Conjecture B5 (j(\mathrm{Jac}(C_b))=0 $\Rightarrow$' with bare \mathrm outside math mode, which crashes pdflatex with '! LaTeX Error: \mathrm allowed only in math mode.'
v3_insert_math_mode_fix.fix: A copy with the offending fragment wrapped in $...$ is staged at sessions/2026-05-02/PCF2-V13-RELEASE/v13_paragraph_insert_v3_fixed.tex; the v1.3 main file \input's the fixed copy. The original session file is left untouched.
v3_insert_math_mode_fix.severity: minor (build-blocking on the v1.3 build, fixed-out-of-band; does not affect R1.3 session results)
